"Reverend" is an honorific title used across various Christian denominations (both Protestant and Catholic) for clergy who serve local congregations. It's not specifically Protestant (it's used broadly), it's not monastic, it's not a high hierarchical position, and it's definitely more of an honorific than a job title.

This must be "Reverend".
